headline: Stacey Widlitz: The consumer is getting hit from all directions
summary: Stacey Widlitz, President of SW Retail Advisors, says higher gas and food prices are pressuring consumers, while Walmart, Costco and TJX gain share as value shopping rises and Gen Z spending shifts.
